author: evdboom
description: Typography formatting and multi-format export for book projects written in Markdown. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: evdboom
releases.description:
## What's Changed
Bindery robustness for 1.0 release.
 - Autodetect pandoc and LibreOffice installs
 - Split large tools.ts for maintainability
 - Harden search index (versioning, batching and retry)
 - Probe pandoc capabilities
 - Add test matrix for different OS families
 - Add and enfore test coverage
 - Update readme's



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/evdboom/Bindery/compare/v0.8.9...v1.0.0
